title: What are you doing this week?
content_html:
Aside from my day job, I'm working on my side project I call Popsicle Boat, a little Elixir/Phoenix social site I run solo, but the part that's been fun this week is playing with using it as the comment section for my own static blog.

Each blog post links to a discussion thread hosted there, there are no dependencies to import, just set up an account and a space for your blog and add a few lines to wire it up.

It's super fun to work on, I don't expect many users or to change the world or anything but I am truly proud of it. The functionality has all been there for a lot of years, mostly at this point I'm just polishing.

My blog is jva.lol if anyone wants to poke at the comment thing.

content_html_zh:
除了我的日常工作之外，我还在做我的业余项目，我称之为 Popsicle Boat，这是一个我单独运行的 Elixir/Phoenix 社交网站，但这周有趣的部分是使用它作为我自己的静态博客的评论部分。

每篇博客文章都链接到那里托管的讨论线程，无需导入任何依赖项，只需为您的博客设置一个帐户和空间，然后添加几行代码即可将其连接起来。

工作起来非常有趣，我不期望有很多用户或改变世界或任何东西，但我真的为此感到自豪。 这些功能已经存在很多年了，目前我只是在完善。

我的博客是 jva.lol 如果有人想戳评论的话。
